# דן המחלץ — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A 24/7 roadside assistance service operating in the central region of Israel and surrounding areas. The business provides emergency road rescue services around the clock, positioning itself as a reliable and always-available solution for drivers in distress. The service emphasizes immediate availability and broad geographic coverage in the center of the country.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About דן המחלץ
A 24/7 roadside assistance service operating in the central region of Israel and surrounding areas. The business provides emergency road rescue services around the clock, positioning itself as a reliable and always-available solution for drivers in distress. The service emphasizes immediate availability and broad geographic coverage in the center of the country.

## Services/Products
- חילוצי דרך
- שירות 24/7
- כיסוי אזור המרכז וסביבה

## Target Audience
נהגים באזור המרכז וסביבתו

## Industry
שירותי חירום ורכב
